typography.notes: Using Raleway as the closest Google Font equivalent to Gov.br's official 'Rawline' font. Apply this font globally.

layout.strategy: Dashboard Layout with Top Navigation and Sidebar

header.top_bar: bg-[#071D41] text-white py-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center. Must contain text 'gov.br' in extra bold.
header.sub_header: bg-[#1351B4] text-white py-4 px-6 flex justify-between items-center. Must contain title 'Serviço de Gerenciamento de Mudanças - SGMD'.

layout.sidebar: w-64 bg-white border-r border-[#E6E6E6] p-6 h-full flex flex-col gap-4
layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid for the Calendar (grid-cols-7) and Metrics (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-6)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1351B4] hover:bg-[#071D41] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-colors font-semibold shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1351B4] text-[#1351B4] hover:bg-[#1351B4]/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-colors font-semibold
buttons.danger: bg-[#E52207] hover:bg-[#8A100B] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-colors font-semibold

cards.style: bg-white border border-[#E6E6E6] rounded-md shadow-sm p-4

calendar.wrapper: bg-white border border-[#E6E6E6] rounded-md overflow-hidden shadow-sm
calendar.cell: bg-white border-b border-r border-[#E6E6E6] p-2 min-h-[120px] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer
calendar.header_cell: bg-[#f8f8f8] font-bold text-[#333333] p-3 text-center border-b border-[#E6E6E6]
calendar.event_badge: text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded truncate mb-1 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1 w-full

modals.content: bg-white rounded-md shadow-xl border-t-4 border-[#1351B4] p-6 max-w-2xl w-full relative

inputs.style: border border-[#E6E6E6] rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1351B4] focus:border-transparent outline-none w-full

components.icons: Use lucide-react. STRICT RULE: DO NOT USE EMOJIS.

images.description: Official Gov.br Logo for the top dark blue header

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Strict Colors: Adhere exactly to the provided color palette. Do not invent new shades of blue. Use #1351B4 for primary actions and #071D41 for the top header.
2. Typography: Import the Raleway font from Google Fonts in your global CSS and apply it to the body. It acts as the stand-in for Rawline.

3. Layout Structure: Build a layout with a Global Gov Header (#071D41 background, white text/logo), an App Sub-header (#1351B4 background with title 'Serviço de Gerenciamento de Mudanças - SGMD'), a sidebar for filters/legend, and a main content area.

4. Calendar Implementation: Build a robust monthly grid calendar. Cells should display a list of color-coded pill badges representing scheduled changes. The calendar needs Next/Previous month controls.
5. Dashboard Elements: Add a top row of Metrics Cards showing total counts for each change status.
6. Interactive Features: Implement a 'Nova Mudança' (New Change) button that opens a Modal with a form to create a change. Allow clicking a calendar event to view its details (Read/Update/Delete).
7. Export & Legend: Include Export to CSV/PDF placeholder buttons. Include a Legend section in the sidebar explaining the status colors.
8. EMOJI BAN: DO NOT under any circumstances use emojis in the code or UI. Use 'lucide-react' icons exclusively (e.g., CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, Calendar, Download).
9. Authentication: Create a simple, professional Login View using Gov.br styles that the user must pass through before seeing the dashboard.
10. Accessibility & Contrast: Ensure the 'Em Execução' badge text is dark (#333333) so it is readable against the Warning (#FFCD07) background. All other badges should have white text.
11. Testing: ALL interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and list items MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='calendar-next-month', data-testid='login-button').
12. Aesthetic Style: Avoid heavy glassmorphism or overly decorative elements. Keep the UI flat, high-contrast, structural, and strictly professional (Swiss/Brutalist inspired for government).
